# konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain (Resource)

EventGatewayListenerPolicyChain Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain" "my_eventgatewaylistenerpolicychain" {
  gateway_id  = "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458"
  listener_id = "3c114ad3-d2f1-4afe-ab9f-f93e75432e12"
  policies = [
    {
      id = "95ebd266-d36b-4b37-ba10-103f969b0c8d"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `gateway_id` (String) The UUID of your Gateway.
- `listener_id` (String) The ID of the Event Gateway Listener.
- `policies` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Optional:

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the policy. Not Null

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain.my_konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain
  id = jsonencode({
    gateway_id = "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458"
    listener_id = "..."
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain.my_konnect_event_gateway_listener_policy_chain '{"gateway_id": "9524ec7d-36d9-465d-a8c5-83a3c9390458", "listener_id": "..."}'
```
